title: Coordinate Display and Conversion Mod
description: A Simple Fabric mod which adds your Overworld and corresponding Nether coordinates to your tab menu. Coordinates can also be displayed on an action bar using /coords
body:
# Coordinate Display — Coords in Tab + Optional Action Bar

**See your own coordinates without opening F3.**  
Shows your coords in the **Tab menu (footer)** and, optionally, on the **action bar**. Includes smart Overworld/Nether conversions and color-coded dimension tags.

## Features
- **Tab footer:** Your current coords appear when you open Tab.
- **Action bar HUD (toggleable):** Same info as a small overlay at the bottom of the screen.
- **Per-player control:** Toggle your HUD with a **keybind** (default **C**) or the **`/coords`** command.
- **Dimension-aware formatting:**
  - Abbrev + color: **OW** (green), **N** (red), **E** (purple)
  - XYZ
  - Overworld ↔ Nether converted coords (rounded); **End** shows *“No portal”*
- **Works everywhere:** single-player, LAN, dedicated servers.
- **Lightweight:** simple Fabric API usage; no invasive mixins.

## Usage
- **Toggle:** `/coords`  
  (Also supports `/coords on`, `/coords off`, `/coords toggle`.)
- **Keybind:** *Toggle Coordinates (Action Bar)* — default **C** (rebind in *Options → Controls → Coordinate Display*).

> **Note:** The keybind requires the client to have the mod. The Tab footer and `/coords` command work server-side only.

## Install Notes
- **Server-only:** Works installed only on the server (Tab footer + command).
- **Client (optional):** Install on clients to use the keybind.

## License
**CC0-1.0**.

---

## Dependencies
- **Fabric Loader:** ≥ **0.17.2**
- **Fabric API:** 1.21.8-compatible
- **Minecraft:** **1.21.8**
- **Java:** **21+**
